cluster_id.description: The cluster ID corresponding to the granted data source.

cluster_name.description: The cluster name corresponding to the granted data source.

column_name.description: The name of the column corresponding to the granted data source.

connection_id.description: The data connection ID corresponding to the granted data source.

database_name.description: The name of the database corresponding to the granted data source.

database_url.description: The URL of the database corresponding to the granted data source.

datasource_type.description: The type of the granted data source.

permission_set_id.description: The ID of the permission set to be granted.

region.description: The region in which to the permission set to be granted privilege is located.

schema_name.description: The schema name corresponding to the DWS data source.

status.description: The current synchronization status of the resource.

sync_msg.description: The status information of the resource.

table_name.description: The name of the data table corresponding to the granted data source.

type.description: The type of the permission to be configured.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the workspace to which the permission set belongs.
